headline: The Sherwin-Williams Company (SHW) – Among the 10 Best May Dividend Stocks to Buy
summary: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) is included among the 10 Best May Dividend Stocks to Buy. On April 21, Bank of America lowered its price recommendation on The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) to $365 from $370. It reiterated a Neutral rating. The analyst said commodity markets moved up quickly through March and into April, driven by the […]
